athletes_email_unique.name: athletes_email_unique
athletes_email_unique.where: "athletes"."email" is not null and "athletes"."deleted_at" is null

athletes_phone_unique.name: athletes_phone_unique
athletes_phone_unique.where: "athletes"."phone" is not null and "athletes"."deleted_at" is null

athletes_shirt_unique.name: athletes_shirt_unique
athletes_shirt_unique.where: "athletes"."shirt_number" is not null and "athletes"."deleted_at" is null

official_evaluation_skill_scale.name: official_evaluation_skill_scale
official_evaluation_skill_scale.value: rating is null or (rating >= 1 and rating <= 5 and (rating * 2) = floor(rating * 2))

official_evaluation_overall_scale.name: official_evaluation_overall_scale
official_evaluation_overall_scale.value: overall is null or (overall >= 1 and overall <= 5 and (overall * 2) = floor(overall * 2))

position_rating_scale.name: position_rating_scale
position_rating_scale.value: rating is null or (rating >= 1 and rating <= 5 and (rating * 2) = floor(rating * 2))

self_assessment_position_scale.name: self_assessment_position_scale
self_assessment_position_scale.value: rating is null or (rating >= 1 and rating <= 5 and (rating * 2) = floor(rating * 2))

self_assessment_skill_scale.name: self_assessment_skill_scale
self_assessment_skill_scale.value: rating is null or (rating >= 1 and rating <= 5 and (rating * 2) = floor(rating * 2))

self_assessment_overall_scale.name: self_assessment_overall_scale
self_assessment_overall_scale.value: overall is null or (overall >= 1 and overall <= 5 and (overall * 2) = floor(overall * 2))

event_slot_xor_waitlist.name: event_slot_xor_waitlist
event_slot_xor_waitlist.value: confirmed_slot is null or waitlist_position is null

match_score_non_negative.name: match_score_non_negative
match_score_non_negative.value: (left_score is null or left_score >= 0) and (right_score is null or right_score >= 0)

match_override_needs_justification.name: match_override_needs_justification
match_override_needs_justification.value: leave_reason <> 'override_manual' or (override_justification is not null and length(trim(override_justification)) >= 3)

cash_tx_manual_needs_reason.name: cash_tx_manual_needs_reason
cash_tx_manual_needs_reason.value: kind <> 'ajuste_manual' or (reason is not null and length(trim(reason)) >= 3)

event_charge_adjustment_needs_reason.name: event_charge_adjustment_needs_reason
event_charge_adjustment_needs_reason.value: status not in ('dispensado', 'estornado') or (adjustment_reason is not null and length(trim(adjustment_reason)) >= 3)

extra_event_mode_values.name: extra_event_mode_values
extra_event_mode_values.value: (charge_mode = 'por_pessoa' and value_per_person_cents is not null) or (charge_mode = 'total_rateado' and total_cents is not null)
